text.p: I want to use these medium to my congratulation to you on your recent election, which makes you to become the chairman of these local government area of State.

Sir, my note to you is nothing but just to notify you about the poor road of which these local government have being facing all this why. The state of bad road in these local government Area is becoming - Unbecoming, that the owners of cars can not be ha-ppy driving his or her car on the road! because of the bad poor state of the road.
Sir, these are some of the dangers and or consequences of bad road.

Poor transportation system, we all know that if the roads are bad, there is a certainty that the transport system will also be bad likewise. people will be scared because of the poor state of the road, and travilling will be very discouraging to make within these local government.
We all know the great importance of good road network, because if the road is bad there will be an enbargo to the development of these local government area.

Nevertheless, poor road network will discourage the development of Agricultures in these local government Area. Bad road network will discourage the local farmers not to produce goods which are transportable, and are not carriable with hands from one place to another.

Furthermore, poor road network will stand as an obstacle to the development of Economic in these local government Area. Also it will discourage petty traders who move from one place to another in the cost of marketing or selling his or her goods. The poor state of bad road will hinder the smooth plan of business and set these local government Area in a state of andicape.

Moreso, poor road facilities also drive away investors, who which to invest in these local government Area, bad road network will poison the mind of the sons and daughters of these local government, who lived abroad or within the country, that whieb to come home and invest because of the poor state of road network. people who which to come back home during an important invent, like festival or during sports or during traditional ceremony, will get discourage to come home when they think about the poor state of road back home.
Therefore, if some of these point are taking into consideration, i think it will be the beginning of greater and better things to come to our local government Area.
